data.title: Why Bitcoin's DeFi Boom Took Years: Solv Protocol's Ryan Chow Spills The Details
data.description: Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) towering $1.5 trillion market cap has long outpaced its rivals, yet its decentralized finance (DeFi) utility has lagged due to slow infrastructure development and regulatory hurdles, according to Ryan Chow, co-founder of Solv Protocol

data.title: Bill Ackman Predicts Strong Future for Berkshire Hathaway After Warren Buffett Steps Down
data.description: Bill Ackman has expressed optimism about the future of Berkshire Hathaway following the Warren Buffett era.

data.title: Trump Strikes Back at NYC's Adams Over Missing $80 Million, Says Funds Were Pulled To Stop Activity of Venezuelan Gang
data.description: Trump defends pulling $80M from NYC, citing concerns over a violent Venezuelan gang's ties to migrant shelters, as Adams sues for funds.

data.title: Mark Cuban Was Asked How He'd Invest $100K — His Answer? Buy Bulk Toothpaste And Soup For The 'Best Guaranteed Return On Investment'
Massive Losses For Crypto Traders As MELANIA Memecoin Plummets
data.description: A crypto trader has reportedly suffered a staggering loss of $15.68 million after trading the official memecoin of First Lady Melania Trump.
